refnamediv.refpurpose: explosion of a list of ts

listitem.para: * testna = a boolean indicating whether the program will test the existence of na's values in the matrices of values y and x
- %t if the user wants to take the min and max dates over which any series exists
- %f if the user wants to take the time period over which all series exist
* x = a (T x k) real matrix
* boundsvarb = a (2 x 1) string matrix (of dates)

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION From a list of ts find the greatest time span over which the series are simultaneously defined and non NA and store in a vector the corresponding values.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
